_comment: DOLPHLINK team digital business cards. Email is the lookup key. The local part of the email (before @) determines BOTH the URL path (/c/?u=<local>) AND the photo filename in the Drive folder (<local>.jpg|png|webp). 'products' references portfolios.items[].key from content.json. Set active=false to hide a former member without losing git history.

config._comment: Global config. ga4Id: paste your GA4 Measurement ID here (G-XXXXXXX) to enable analytics. landingBase: where the QR-decoded URL lives. cardBase: GitHub Pages root used to build absolute share URLs.
